title: Townsend Brown's UFO Experience
summary: Brief discussion of Townsend Brown's UFO encounter as a teenager in Catalina, where a ball of light approached him and allegedly transmitted knowledge that became the foundation of his life's work in his Pasadena laboratory.

key_claims.claim: Townsend Brown had a UFO experience in Catalina as a teenager where a ball of light approached him
Brown learned everything about his life's work instantly from the ball of light encounter
Brown had a private laboratory in Pasadena funded by his parents
